key_quote: Gap between verified proofs and executable code: 25K LoC of Lean 4 proofs verify mathematical theorems over abstract objects, but the 30K LoC implementation uses floating-point arithmetic and concrete data structures with no verified extraction or translation validation.
rationale: The causal identification + posterior-predictive shields architecture is acknowledged as novel. Primary blockers are the proof-to-code gap, vacuous PAC-Bayes bounds, LASSO-ANM inconsistency, EM convergence not guaranteed, and bounded LTL convexity uncharacterized. All are depth/rigor issues. Category B.
